agentic_assessments.summary: This Research run consumed a heavy execution profile for its task shape.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Compare this run to similar successful runs and trim unnecessary turns, tools, or write actions.

agentic_assessments.summary: About 50% of this run's turns appear to be data-gathering that could move to deterministic steps.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Move data-fetching work to frontmatter steps: (pre-agent) writing to /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ or post-steps: (post-agent) to reduce inference cost. See the Deterministic & Agentic Patterns guide.

noops.message: CI analysis complete — no new failures found. All recently merged PRs (#38247, #38246, #38176, #38259) have green CI check runs. The two open PRs with failing CI (#38228 compute SDK TypeSpec migration, #38232 storage-file-datalake TypeSpec migration) are unmerged and their failures are specific to those PRs' own massive TypeSpec-migration changes. The previously tracked event-hubs AggregateError failure (issue #38231) was fixed and closed on April 21. The known failures tracking issue (#37864) lists no pre-existing failures. No GitHub issue created.
